title: melastoma tanjiewhoei
intro: Melastoma tanjiewhoei, also known as the Tanjung Puteri or Tanjung Puteri Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Melastoma tanjiewhoei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves drying and crushing its leaves, which can be made into a tea or used as a tincture to reap its medicinal benefits.
